name: upnp-static
description: Bring up the baseline single-router UPnP lab and verify a real WAN-side dhtnet session plus the UPnP mapping it creates.
notes: This is the first orchestrated baseline scenario: topology setup, probe execution, teardown, and reusable summary output.
The runner automatically starts the bundled dhtnet dsh listener helper inside the LAN namespace as the original invoking user.
The lab also starts a local OpenDHT bootstrap node inside the WAN namespace so the scenario stays fully self-contained.
If your dhtnet binaries are not under <repo>/build, set DHTNET_BUILD_DIR before running the scenario.
The nested probe summary is copied into the orchestrator capture set for easier review.
